description: A copywriter needs to create three distinct ad headlines and two descriptions for a new Google Ads campaign.

nodes.task_description: Review the campaign brief to understand the target audience and unique selling propositions (USPs).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the key messaging points.

nodes.task_description: Write three headlines, each under the 30-character limit, highlighting different USPs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces three compliant and compelling headlines.

nodes.task_description: Write two descriptions, each under the 90-character limit, including a call-to-action (CTA).

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces two compliant and persuasive descriptions.
